should_trigger.prompt: Triage these review findings and create a plan
Turn the review results into actionable work items
Prioritize the findings from the code review
Sort these review findings by severity so I know what to fix first
Ugh, there are way too many issues here, just tell me which ones are actually blockers and which I can ignore for now
I am not sure how to handle these review results, please help me decide what to fix or defer
Categorize the current review findings into fix now, skip, or defer based on severity
Perform a triage of the current review findings to identify Iron Law violations

should_not_trigger.prompt: Plan a new feature from scratch
Commit the current changes and push to the remote branch
Can you write a summary of the code review findings?
How do I fix a security vulnerability in this function?
Please refactor this code to be more efficient
Create a roadmap for the next sprint based on these bugs
Run the linter and show me the errors
Write a detailed report of all the bugs found

hard_should_trigger.prompt: The review found 15 issues — help me decide which to fix now vs later
After fixing the bug, also check if triage needs updating

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Review the code and write up findings
Fix this bug then run the test suite and review the results
